pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 15: PROJECT_DIR variable definition; export_result.sh line 7 confirms same path
Task description specifies 'Set environment variables FLASK_DEBUG=1'; verifier.py line 91 expects 'FLASK_DEBUG' == '1'
Task description specifies 'FLASK_ENV=development'; verifier.py line 97 expects 'FLASK_ENV' == 'development'
Task description line 5: 'Map host port 5678 to container port 5678 (for remote debugging)'; verifier.py line 132 checks for '5678/tcp' in api_ports
Task description line 5: 'Map host port 5432 to container port 5432 (to allow local GUI access)'; verifier.py line 142 checks for '5432/tcp' in db_ports
Task description line 5: 'Bind mount the host directory ./api to /app in the container'; verifier.py line 108 checks for Destination == '/app' with Type == 'bind'
Task description line 5: 'Override the command to run the dev server: flask run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=5000 --reload'; verifier.py line 121 checks for 'flask run' in cmd_str
setup_task.sh line 89 specifies 'flask==3.0.0'; Flask 3.0.0 is a real release from September 30, 2023 (https://github.com/pallets/flask/releases)
setup_task.sh line 90 specifies 'psycopg2-binary==2.9.9'; psycopg2-binary 2.9.9 is a real release from October 3, 2023 (https://pypi.org/project/psycopg2-binary/2.9.9/)
setup_task.sh line 91 specifies 'gunicorn==21.2.0'; Gunicorn 21.2.0 is a real release from July 19, 2023 (https://github.com/benoitc/gunicorn/releases/tag/21.2.0)
setup_task.sh line 53 specifies 'image: postgres:16-alpine'; postgres:16-alpine is an official Docker Hub image (https://hub.docker.com/_/postgres)
setup_task.sh line 26 specifies 'image: nginx:alpine'; nginx:alpine is an official Docker Hub image (https://hub.docker.com/_/nginx/)
setup_task.sh line 95 specifies 'FROM python:3.11-slim'; python:3.11-slim is an official Docker Hub image (https://hub.docker.com/_/python)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Docker Compose development environment for a Flask web application at /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/webapp/. The docker-compose.override.yml file must set environment variables FLASK_DEBUG=1 and FLASK_ENV=development for the API service, bind mount ./api to /app for hot-reloading, override the API command to 'flask run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=5000 --reload', and expose ports 5678 (API debugging) and 5432 (PostgreSQL). The base configuration includes Flask 3.0.0, psycopg2-binary 2.9.9, gunicorn 21.2.0, nginx:alpine, and postgres:16-alpine images.
